lrc:
[00:03.64]I can see it in your eyes
[00:22.94]You've been carrying the night
[00:26.44]Trying hard to smile again
[00:29.60]Hiding all the hurt within
[00:33.26]You don't have to be that strong
[00:36.80]You don't have to walk alone
[00:40.28]If the world feels cold today
[00:42.82]I'm still here, I'll stay
[00:46.80]Take my hand
[00:48.98]Take your time
[00:50.32]No need to run
[00:52.08]No need to hide
[00:56.20]Just breathe
[00:58.68]Better days are on their way
[01:05.68]Even if the sky turns gray
[01:11.68]When your heart forgets to shine
[01:18.68]I'll remember it for you
[01:23.44]Little by little
[01:25.28]You'll find your light
[01:29.68]Better days
[01:31.80]Are coming soon
[01:37.52]Every tear has told a story
[01:41.56]Every scar becomes a part
[01:44.88]Not because you're falling down
[01:48.40]Means you've lost your way somehow
[01:51.82]When the silence feels too loud
[01:55.70]When the answers can't be found
[01:59.16]Lean on me until you smile
[02:02.52]I'll be here awhile
[02:05.26]When you can't believe again
[02:08.64]I'll believe enough for two
[02:12.14]Until your heart
[02:16.06]Finds its way back home
[02:20.52]Better days are on their way
[02:25.70]You don't have to be afraid
[02:32.54]Every storm will learn to fade
[02:39.78]Every dawn begins the same
[02:44.54]Little by little
[02:46.94]You'll be alright
[02:50.70]Better days
[02:53.30]Are coming soon
